verbs.name: connect
verbs.description: Onboard project to vault — rigid 5-step init (breadcrumb, AGENTS.md+CLAUDE.md, vault scaffold, session note, .gitignore). Idempotent.

verbs.name: port
verbs.description: Migrate any legacy project (raw, obsidian-bridge, hand-authored) to adjudant compliance. Two-phase: preview, then apply with backup. Idempotent.

verbs.name: sync
verbs.description: Push project state to vault — refresh brief, mirror handoff, refresh project index.

verbs.name: check
verbs.description: Read-only summary — project state, vault snapshot, schema compliance. check.py scans, Claude renders. Never writes.

verbs.name: sitrep
verbs.description: ELI5 orientation briefing for re-orienting after a break — where we were, what's done, where the vault is, where to start. Read-only (sitrep.py scans, Claude renders).

verbs.name: tidy
verbs.description: Surface mechanical sweep — indexes, tags, wikilink form, updated:. Routine (daily/weekly). Two-phase: tidy.py preview → apply. Idempotent.

verbs.name: ramasse
verbs.description: Deep structural clean — folders, schema, file types, naming, broken-wikilink triage. Sparing (quarterly). ramasse_scan.py analyses; superpowers plans + executes.

verbs.name: dream
verbs.description: Content/knowledge/memory refresh — the third, semantic cleanup tier. dream.py (read-only) emits a 10-category staleness/contradiction/redundancy catalog; Claude judges, superpowers executes with backups.

verbs.name: draw
verbs.description: Create visual artefacts — canvas, base, or mermaid diagram (hand-authored or generated from vault data via graph.py).

verbs.name: board
verbs.description: Scaffold a self-hosted work-order kanban (single-file HTML, drag-to-move, disk-persisted) seeded from tasks/. Re-seeding merges without clobbering dragged columns; --project SLUG or --all for other projects.
